Singed.trading_pattern: Singed's poison damage is relentless. He runs from your combos easily with W. You can't catch him.
Singed.ability_to_dodge: His R slow + W run — avoid chasing him into poison pools. He kites endlessly.
Singed.early_game: Singed proxies and runs. Your combo doesn't work against kiting. Play safe.
Singed.mid_game: His Rylai's slows you. Your all-in is less effective. Teamfight instead of chasing.
Singed.late_game: He outscales through kiting. You can't catch him. Stick to grouped fights.
Singed.win_condition: Group for teamfights. Never chase him alone. Force grouped fights.
Singed.scaling: Singed outscales through kiting. You're early-game focused.
Singed.positioning: Don't chase him endlessly. Fight around teamfights and objectives.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Vayne's range and tumble let her kite from your combos. She applies true damage slowly.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Her E condemn stun — move away from walls. She'll condemn you into walls for stun.
Vayne.early_game: Vayne is weak early but kites well. Your combo is strong but hard to land. Play safe.
Vayne.mid_game: Her items accelerate scaling. Your combo is still relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Vayne.late_game: She's a hypercarry late. You can't duel. Group and protect your team.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early. Get a lead. Teamfight grouped with numbers advantage.
Vayne.scaling: Vayne outscales as a hypercarry. Win early.
Vayne.positioning: Stay away from walls. Rush her early to combo.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E spirit grab deals massive damage with tentacles. She outbursts you early.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E spirit grab — dodge by moving sideways. If hit, you fight at massive disadvantage.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi is strong early. Play around her E. Avoid extended trades.
Illaoi.mid_game: Her tentacles are still oppressive. Your combo helps but is risky. Teamfight grouped.
Illaoi.late_game: She outscales through tentacles. You can't duel her. Force grouped fights.
Illaoi.win_condition: Survive early. Avoid her E completely. Teamfight grouped.
Illaoi.scaling: Illaoi outscales through tentacles. You're early-game focused.
Illaoi.positioning: Space from tentacles. Avoid her E completely.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes safely from range with Q. His shrooms punish extended trades. Play around vision.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded, you can't combo.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo pokes safely. Your combo is strong but risky to execute. Play safe early.
Teemo.mid_game: His shrooms are everywhere. Your combo is still relevant. Teamfight grouped.
Teemo.late_game: He splits and shrooms. You combo better in teamfights. Never let him split.
Teemo.win_condition: Avoid shrooms. Look for early kill windows. Teamfight grouped.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through teamfight combos. Teemo through split push.
Teemo.positioning: Rush him to combo when possible. Avoid shrooms.

Aurora.trading_pattern: Aurora's Q poke and dive damage are strong early. Her projectiles are hard to dodge.
Aurora.ability_to_dodge: Her R engage — move perpendicular to avoid. It stuns and deals damage.
Aurora.early_game: Aurora's poke is strong. Your combo is good but risky. Play safe early.
Aurora.mid_game: Her items help scaling. Your combo is still relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Aurora.late_game: She outscales through ranged damage. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Aurora.win_condition: Survive early. Look for combo windows. Teamfight grouped.
Aurora.scaling: Aurora outscales through ranged damage. You're early-game focused.
Aurora.positioning: Rush her to combo when possible. Don't let her poke safely.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia's Q poison and poke are relentless. Her range outclasses you early.
Cassiopeia.ability_to_dodge: Her R petrify — move sideways to avoid. It stuns instantly.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Cassiopeia outpokes and outzones you. Play safe and minimize trades.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Your combo is still relevant. Her range and poke are oppressive. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Cassiopeia.late_game: She outscales through poke and kiting. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Survive early. Look for combo windows. Teamfight grouped.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales through range and poke. You're early-game focused.
Cassiopeia.positioning: Rush her to combo when possible. Don't let her poke safely.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: Yasuo dashes through minions with E to harass. His windwall blocks your abilities. Play around it.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: His E-Q combo chain — move away from minions. Windwall blocks your Q.
Yasuo.early_game: Yasuo dashes and harasses. Your combo is strong. Trade hard when his E is down.
Yasuo.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His split push is relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Yasuo.late_game: Yasuo scales as a split pusher. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Yasuo.win_condition: Get a lead early. Teamfight grouped. Use R combo in teamfights.
Yasuo.scaling: Even — both scale in different directions.
Yasuo.positioning: Stay away from minions to prevent E dashes. Trade when E is down.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's Q-AA-Q combos are strong. Your empowered abilities match hers. Trade when her abilities are down.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her R — when she uses it, position away. It grants range and damage.
Riven.early_game: Riven is strong early. Your combo matches her. Trade hard when her abilities are down.
Riven.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. Her split push is relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Riven.late_game: Riven scales as a split pusher. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Riven.win_condition: Get a lead early. Teamfight grouped. Use R combo in fights.
Riven.scaling: Riven scales slightly better early. You scale as a teamfighter.
Riven.positioning: Trade when her abilities are down. Don't stand in a line.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q swings deal high damage and heal him. Your combo matches his. Trade when his Q is down.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q swings — dodge by moving perpendicular. Avoid standing in swings.
Aatrox.early_game: Trade hard when his Q is down. Your combo is strong. Look for kills early.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His healing is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Aatrox.late_game: Aatrox scales through items. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Aatrox.win_condition: Get a lead early. Teamfight grouped. Use R combo in fights.
Aatrox.scaling: Even — both scale through items and abilities.
Aatrox.positioning: Dodge his Q swings by moving sideways. Trade when Q is down.

Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear E flip interrupts your combo. His W all-in is strong. Play around his engage.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His E flip — move perpendicular when charging. If flipped, he all-ins with W.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear's engage is risky. Your combo is strong. Trade hard when his E is down.
Volibear.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His tankiness is high. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Volibear.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Volibear.win_condition: Get a lead early. Teamfight grouped. Use R combo in fights.
Volibear.scaling: Volibear outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Volibear.positioning: Move perpendicular to his E. Trade when his E is down.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar mini-form pokes early. Mega all-in is oppressive. Trade hard when he's mini and weakened.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His mega transformation — brace for impact. His R knockback is strong.
Gnar.early_game: Trade hard when he's mini. Your combo is strong. Look for early kills.
Gnar.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His form cycling is unpredictable. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Gnar.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Gnar.win_condition: Get a lead early. Target him when mini. Teamfight grouped.
Gnar.positioning: Target him when mini. Avoid when mega. Trade when weakened.

K'Sante.trading_pattern: K'Sante has strong poke and all-in. His E engage is powerful. Trade when his abilities are down.
K'Sante.ability_to_dodge: His E lunge — move sideways when charging. His R pulls you into him.
K'Sante.early_game: Trade hard when his abilities are down. Your combo is strong. Look for early kills.
K'Sante.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His engage is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
K'Sante.late_game: He outscales through tanking. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
K'Sante.win_condition: Get a lead early. Teamfight grouped. Use R combo in fights.
K'Sante.scaling: K'Sante outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
K'Sante.positioning: Move sideways to avoid his E. Trade when abilities are down.

Ambessa.trading_pattern: Ambessa's Q range and E engage are strong. Her ult is an execute tool. Play around her engage.
Ambessa.ability_to_dodge: Her E charge — move sideways to avoid. It locks you into her combo range.
Ambessa.early_game: Ambessa is strong early. Your combo is good but risky. Play safe and trade carefully.
Ambessa.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. Her ult is an execute. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Ambessa.late_game: She outscales through ult utility. You scale as a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Ambessa.win_condition: Survive early. Look for combo windows. Teamfight grouped.
Ambessa.scaling: Ambessa outscales through ult utility. You're early-game focused.
Ambessa.positioning: Move sideways to avoid her E. Trade when her abilities are down.

Darius.trading_pattern: Your empowered combo outdamages his Q outer ring. Trade hard with Fury stacks. When Fury is low, play safe.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Your empowered W prevents his poke.
Darius.early_game: You outdamage him with Fury combos. Keep trading and maintain pressure.
Darius.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His ult is dangerous. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Darius.late_game: He outscales slightly through ult utility. You're a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Darius.win_condition: Maintain Fury. Trade hard early. Teamfight grouped.
Darius.scaling: Darius outscales slightly. You're early-game focused.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to deny Q outer ring. Trade when Fury is up.

Garen.trading_pattern: Your empowered combo outdamages his Judgment. Trade hard with Fury. When Fury is low, be careful.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — when he winds up, back away. Your empowered abilities don't require abilities anyway.
Garen.early_game: Trade hard with Fury combos. Maintain pressure. He scales to a tank later.
Garen.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His ult is dangerous. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Garen.late_game: He outscales through tanking. You're a teamfighter. Group for fights.
Garen.win_condition: Maintain Fury. Trade hard early. Teamfight grouped.
Garen.scaling: Garen outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Garen.positioning: Back away when he winds up Q. Trade when Fury is up.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Your empowered combo outdamages his tankiness early. Trade hard with Fury.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces armor but doesn't stop your combo damage.
Malphite.early_game: Trade hard with Fury combos. You should dominate early.
Malphite.mid_game: Your combo is powerful. His R engage helps him scale. Teamfight grouped.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Malphite.win_condition: Maintain Fury. Trade hard early. Teamfight grouped.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Malphite.positioning: Trade hard when Fury is up. Don't let him scale into teamfights.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Your empowered combo destroys her early. She's incredibly weak to all-ins.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: She's incredibly weak early. Trade hard with Fury. You should kill her.
Kayle.mid_game: She scales with items. Your combo is still relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales dramatically. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Kayle.win_condition: Kill her early. Maintain Fury. Roam and group.
Kayle.scaling: Kayle outscales dramatically. You must win early.
Kayle.positioning: Rush her early. Don't let her scale.

Jayce.trading_pattern: Your empowered combo matches his burst. Trade hard with Fury when you catch him.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: His gate shockwave — move sideways. His range form is safer.
Jayce.early_game: Trade hard with Fury combos. Catch him when his abilities are down.
Jayce.mid_game: Your combo is powerful grouped. His poke is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Jayce.late_game: He outscales through poke. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Jayce.win_condition: Maintain Fury. Trade hard early. Teamfight grouped.
Jayce.scaling: Jayce outscales as a poke champion. You're early-game focused.
Jayce.positioning: Catch him when his abilities are down. Trade when Fury is up.
